title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
